verses.1: Come near, you nations, to hear!
verses.2: For the LORD is enraged against all the nations,
verses.3: Their slain will also be cast out,
verses.4: All of the army of the sky will be dissolved.
verses.5: For my sword has drunk its fill in the sky.
verses.6: The LORD’s sword is filled with blood.
verses.7: The wild oxen will come down with them,
verses.8: For the LORD has a day of vengeance,
verses.9: Its streams will be turned into pitch,
verses.10: It won’t be quenched night or day.
verses.11: But the pelican and the porcupine will possess it.
verses.12: They shall call its nobles to the kingdom, but none shall be there;
verses.13: Thorns will come up in its palaces,
verses.14: The wild animals of the desert will meet with the wolves,
verses.15: The arrow snake will make her nest there,
verses.16: Search in the book of the LORD, and read:
verses.17: He has cast the lot for them,
